parameters.query: INSERT INTO expenses (amount, description, category_id, user_id, expense_date, capture_channel, payment_method, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ({{ $json.amount }}, {{ $json.description | pg }}, {{ $json.category_id }}, {{ $json.user_id }}, '{{ $json.expense_date }}', '{{ $json.capture_channel }}', {{ $json.payment_method | pg }}, '{{ $json.status }}', NOW(), NOW()) RETURNING *;
